actionUnits.condition: Simulate Player (serialized reference fileID: 7425022) entering the Elevator's trigger volume (BoxCollider id: 1067963289, isTrigger = true) to invoke AttachToElevator.OnTriggerEnter on MonoBehaviour (component id: 1067963293, script guid: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77). Note: At least one of the colliders (Player or Elevator) must have a Rigidbody; Elevator has no Rigidbody per scene. Also note: current script compares gameObject == player instead of other.gameObject == player, so parenting will not occur unless 'player' is set to the Elevator itself.

Simulate Player (serialized reference fileID: 7425022) exiting the Elevator's trigger volume (BoxCollider id: 1067963289) to invoke AttachToElevator.OnTriggerExit on MonoBehaviour (component id: 1067963293, script guid: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77). Requires the entering condition to have happened and at least one Rigidbody between the two colliders. Due to the script's equality check (gameObject == player), unparenting logic will not execute unless 'player' is assigned to the Elevator.
